rationale: Both reviews correctly identify that ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup stubs and the premature IsUnipotent definition should be removed, so the core scope fix is shared. Review 2 additionally catches that AffineAlgGroup bundles finiteType and geomReduced into one class, which (regardless of roadmap citation) is a real scope-refinement: splitting them keeps each concern focused and admits non-reduced group schemes. This extra, diff-verifiable finding gives Review 2 a genuine edge.
